name: NUCOR CORP
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Overview Nucor Corporation, a Delaware corporation incorporated in 1958, and its affiliates (Nucor, the Company, we, us or our) manufacture steel and steel products. The Company also produces and procures ferrous and non-ferrous materials primarily for use in its steel manufacturing business.
